name: Coastal Breeze Sunglasses
description: Polarized UV400 lenses with a lightweight tortoise-shell frame. Built for long beach days and golden-hour drives.

name: Tropical Linen Shirt
description: Breathable 100% linen shirt with a relaxed fit and hand-painted palm print. Sun, surf, sundown approved.

name: SPF 50 Mineral Sunscreen
description: Reef-safe mineral sunscreen with zinc oxide. Lightweight, non-greasy, and water-resistant for 80 minutes.

name: Sand Dune Straw Hat
description: Wide-brim natural straw hat with grosgrain ribbon. UPF 50+ shade for face, neck, and shoulders.

name: Hydra-Cool Water Bottle 1L
description: Double-walled stainless steel bottle keeps drinks icy for 24 hours. Leak-proof lid and powder-coat finish.

name: Sunset Beach Towel
description: Oversized quick-dry sand-resistant towel in gradient sunset hues. Folds down to pocket-size.

name: Aloe After-Sun Gel
description: Cooling aloe vera gel with cucumber and chamomile. Soothes sun-kissed skin in seconds.

name: Reef Snorkel Set
description: Anti-fog tempered-glass mask, dry-top snorkel, and adjustable fins. Crystal-clear views, every dip.
